subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1917-11-12 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: On the second day of Muharram in the year 1233, in Tehran, in the district of the Shimran Gate [3.5s]... ...Ḥají Mírza Áqasí harbored the utmost enmity towards Mírza [ʻAbbas Núrí]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در یوم ثانی محرم سنه ١٢٣٣ در طهران در محله دروازه شمیران
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of dreams and visions, @special knowledge of the Manifestation of God, @early years; early ministry of Baha'u'llah, @innateness; early self-awareness of the Manifestations of God, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God
